<!-- =============================================================
     Shared table definitions for 411b_spring pages.

     HOW TO USE:
     1. Include this file once in a .qmd page 
     2. Place whichever div(s) you need anywhere on that page:
           <div id="table-spring-all"></div>
     Tables without a matching div on the page are simply skipped.

     HOW TO ADD A NEW TABLE:
     Add a matching buildTable() call in the <script> below
     ============================================================= -->


<script src="spring-deadlines-data.js"></script>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  buildTable(r => true,        "table-spring-all");
  buildTable(r => r.week <= 7, "table-week1-7");
  buildTable("technical-doc",  "table-technical-doc");
  buildTable("presentation",   "table-presentation");
  buildTable("admin",          "table-admin");
});
</script>
